chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-4279 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For hearing of main case 25.09.2025 Mr. Nasrullah Korai, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Muhammad Ali Lakhani, advocate Syed Israr Hussian, Law Officer of respondent No.3 Mr. Muhammad Sohail Imran, Legal Officer, Universities and Boards Department, Government of Sindh Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG --------- Learned counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press the instant petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed application(s).
